name: Etherwing Moth
description: A peculiar lifeform that shimmers with sacred golden light, drifting like a moth through the equally mysterious interstice.\nLegend has it that Etherwing Moths were born from the feathers of angels who fell to the mortal world after rebelling against the lord of the heavens. However, this does not explain their presence here in the domain of eternal stasis. Through certain special methods, Tubby has helped them adapt to the Serenitea Pot, where they now drift and flutter freely...
